channel.title: Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: General Info
item.description:
Leveling in Zuluhotel Omega

To reach a level in a class you will need to have at least the amounts shown in the table below.

Decimals will not count towards your level so if you have 74.9 in a skill it will count as 74.

To reach higher than level 4 you will need either skill items or get tomes to raise your skill caps.

You can also find stat potions to raise your stat caps.

item.title: Bard
item.description:
Skills

  • Begging
  • Cartography
  • Discordance
  • Herding
  • Musicianship
  • Peacemaking
  • Provocation
  • Taste Identification

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Can use Book of Songs.
  • Can use Archaic book of Verses
  • Gains dexterity and intelligence quicker.
  • Can use shepherd’s crook without mace-fighting, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear plate armor.
  • Can’t wear shields.
  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Gains strength slower.

Additional info

To fill up the Book of Songs you will need to buy Pen and Ink (Mapmaker NPC) and simply double-click it. Then target the song scroll and the Book of Songs you wish to scribe the song into. To fill up the Archaic book of Verses you need to use the verse scroll by double-clicking it. Upon success it will automatically be added to the Verse book.

item.title: Crafter
item.description:
Skills

  • Arms lore
  • Blacksmithy
  • Bowcraft/Fletching
  • Carpentry
  • Lumberjacking
  • Mining
  • Tailoring
  • Tinkering

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Gains strength quicker.

Penalties

  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Can’t wear strength mods.
  • Gains intelligence slower.

item.title: GM Items
item.description:
GM Armor

Item Armor rating (Complete set) Properties Blocks casting if equipped
Zephyr Chainmail Coif 70 Air protection 75% Magic penalty 4 *
Zephyr Chainmail Leggings 70 Air protection 75% Magic penalty 4 *
Zephyr Chainmail Tunic 70 Air protection 75% Magic penalty 4 *
Infernal Ringmail Tunic 75 Fire protection 75% Magic penalty 6 *
Infernal Ringmail Sleeves 75 Fire protection 75% Magic penalty 3 *
Infernal Ringmail Leggings 75 Fire protection 75% Magic penalty 3 *
Infernal Ringmail Gloves 75 Fire protection 75% Magic penalty 3 *
Bonearms of Terror 50 Reduce dex penalty by 2 Magic penalty 10 *
Bonetunic of Terror 50 Reduce dex penalty by 2 Magic penalty 25 *
Bonegloves of Terror 50 Reduce dex penalty by 2 Magic penalty 5 *
Bonehelm of Terror 50 Reduce dex penalty by 2 Magic penalty 10 *
Bonelegs of Terror 50 Reduce dex penalty by 2 Magic penalty 10 *

Plate Helm of Drakon 65 Poison protection lvl 3 *
Platemail Arms of Drakon 65 Poison protection lvl 3 *
Platemail Legs of Drakon 65 Poison protection lvl 3 *

Female Plate of Ryous 75 Earth protection 75% *
Plate Helm of Ryous 75 Earth protection 75% *

Platemail Gloves of Ryous 75 Earth protection 75% *

Platemail of Ryous 75 Earth protection 75% *
Shield of Ryous 60 Earth protection 75% No
Female Plate of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Plate Helm of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Platemail Arms of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Platemail Legs of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Platemail Gloves of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Platemail Gorget of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Platemail of Darkness 70 Necro protection 75% *
Shield of Darkness 60 Necro protection 75% No
Elven Female Plate 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Plate Helm 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Platemail Arms 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Platemail Legs 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Platemail Gloves 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Platemail Gorget 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Platemail 65 Healing increase lvl 3 *
Elven Shield 60 Healing increase lvl 3 No
Sage’s Robe 10 Magery +5 Magic penalty -15 *
Stygian Robe 40 * *
Sylvian Studded Gorget 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Studded Gloves 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Studded Sleeves 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Studded Leggings 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Studded Tunic 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Female Studded 70 Earth protection 75% *
Sylvian Studded Cap 70 Earth protection 75% *

GM Weapons

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Properties Blocks casting if equipped
Nagash’s Staff of Sorcery 5d5+23 80 Spell hit: Spell: Elemental fury Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 5 Magery +5 Magic penalty -15 Special boost when double-clicked with a 30 minutes cooldown No
Dreams Tainted Fury 4d4+41 53 Normal * No
Dekeron’s Thunder 6d6+18 30 Spell hit: Spell: Chain Lightning Chance of effect: 60% Circke: 10 * No
One Handed Dart Thrower of Amroth 5d8+30 50 Normal One Handed No
Scalpel of Trevize 1d8+21 75 Piercing hit * No
Lance of Lothian 2d10+36 54 Banish hit * No
Spear of Renah 3d6+38 60 Spell hit: Spell: Meteor Swarm Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 7 * No
Tjaldur’s Staff of Haste 5d5+20 90 Normal * No
Anubis’s Mace of Death 4d3+36 75 Normal * No
Omero’s Pickaxe 1d15+5 40 Normal Double ore amount No
Erik’s Big Basher 4d6+37 45 Slayer hit: Dragon slayer * No
Balthazaar’s Chilling Scimitar 2d7+20 71 Spell hit: Spell: Ice Strike Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 10 * No
Axe of Anias 3d5+35 50 Spell hit: Spell: Explosion Chance of effect: 50% Circle 5 * No
Katana of Kieri 2d8+35 87 Normal * No
Bardiche of Lynx 5d6+38 33 Random slayer type each hit (Not human slayer) 2 tiles range No
Xarafax’s Axe 4d7 50 Normal Double log amount No
Halberd of Alcatraz 5d6+60 8 Normal 2 tiles range No
Enchanted Sword of Zulu 1d23+35 38 Spell hit: Spell: Random(5 kinds) Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 5 * No
Grark’s Walking Stick 3d4+35 45 Normal Provocation +5 Special AOE provoke when double-clicked with a 20 seconds cooldown No
Tekagi of Omega 3d2+35 65 Critical chance for warriors only. Higher chance for each level. * No
Deadly Sure Strike Shurikens * * * Thiefs only shurikens, use to throw multiple shurikens around you and poison everything it hits. *
Fishing Rod of Sacrifice * * * Double fish amount No

item.title: Item Modifiers
item.description:
Stat prefixes

When an item receives a negative modifier it means the item is cursed.

Cursed items cannot be unequipped. Visit a High Priest to uncurse the item. Simply say “Uncurse” to be able to unequip it or “Purify” to revert the item to it’s positive form.

For example a purified Frail (-8 str) will turn into a Hero’s (+8 str) modifier.

Strength Intelligence Dexterity Amount
Warrior’s Apprentice’s Cutpurse’s +2
Veteran’s Adept’s Thief’s +4
Champion’s Wizard’s Cat Burglar’s +6
Hero’s Archmage’s Tumbler’s +8
Warlord’s Magister’s Acrobat’s +10
King’s Oracle’s Escape Artist’s +12
Weakling’s Fool’s Heavy -2
Enfeebling Simpleton’s Leaden -4
Powerless Infantile Encumbering -6
Frail Senile Binding -8
Diseased Demented Fumbling -10
Leper’s Madman’s Blundering -12

Armor suffixes armor/shields

Suffix Armor amount
Defense +5
Guarding +10
Hardening +15
Fortification +20
Invulnerability +25
Invincibility +30
Penetration -5
Vulnerability -10
Disharmony -15
Distress -20
Disaster -25
Catastrophe -30

HP prefixes armors/shields

Prefix HP amount
Durable +5
Substantial +10
Massive +15
Fortified +20
Tempered +25
Indestructible +30
Chipped -5
Flimsy -10
Broken -15
Crumbling -20
Rotten -25
Decomposing -30

Armor prefixes clothing

Prefix Armor amount
Iron +1
Steel +2
Meteoric Steel +3
Obsidian +4
Onyx +5
Adamantium +6
Glass -1
Rusty -2
Aluminum -3
Pitted -4
Dirty -5
Tarnished -6

item.title: Mage
item.description:
Skills

  • Alchemy
  • Evaluating intelligence
  • Inscription
  • Item identification
  • Magery
  • Meditation
  • Resisting spells
  • Spirit speak

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with spells.
  • Penetrates 3% magic protection per class level.
  • Can wear leather armor without receiving magic penalty.
  • Gains intelligence quicker.
  • Can use Black, Quarter and Gnarled staffs without skill for it, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear studded/bone/ringmail/chainmail/platemail armor, shields and items with strength modifiers.
  • Deals less melee damage.
  • Takes increased melee damage.
  • Gains strength slower.

item.description:
Pentagram Armor

Item Armor rating (Complete set) Properties Blocks casting if equipped Properties Blocks casting if equipped
Shield of the Holy Element 40 Holy protection 75% No Magery +5 Magic penalty -15 Special boost when double-clicked with a 30 minutes cooldown No
Breastplate of the Holy Element 65 Holy protection 75% * * No
Plate Legs of the Holy Element 65 Holy protection 75% * * No

Pentagram Weapons

item.title: Powerplayer
item.description:
Skills

  • All

Bonuses

  • 10% increased skill gain at level 3.
  • 20% increased skill gain at level 4.
  • 30% increased skill gain at level 5.

Penalties

  • No specialized class bonus.

item.title: Protection Modifiers
item.description:
Melee protection

Suffix Protection level
Protection 1
Stoneskin 2
Unmovable Stone 3
Adamantine Shielding 4
Mystical Cloaks 5
Holy Auras 6
Pain -1
Bleeding -2
Rending -3
Tearing -4
Shredding -5
Peril -6

Fire, Water, Air, Earth protections

Where XXX is the elements name.

Suffix Protection level
Elemental XXX Bane 25%
Elemental XXX Warding 50%
Elemental XXX Protection 65%
Elemental XXX Immunity 75%
Elemental XXX Attunement 85%
Elemental XXX Absorbsion 95%
Elemental XXX Weakness -25%
Elemental XXX Vulnerability -50%
Elemental XXX Amplification -75%
Elemental XXX Defenselessness -100%
Elemental XXX Exposure -125%
Elemental XXX Endangerment -150%

Necro protection

Suffix Protection level
Mystic Barrier 25%
Divine Shielding 50%
Heavenly Sanctuary 65%
Angelic Protection 75%
Arch-Angel’s Guidance 85%
Seraphim’s Warding 95%
Evil Influence -25%
Liche’s Laughter -50%
Daemonic Temptation -75%
Dark Channeling -100%
Shadow’s Touch -125%
the Guardian’s Blessing -150%

Magic immunity

The protection level protects against circle x spells. For example Tempered Blackrock protects against circle 6 and lower spells.

item.title: Ranger
item.description:
Skills

  • Animal lore
  • Animal taming
  • Archery
  • Camping
  • Cooking
  • Fishing
  • Tracking
  • Veterinary

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with ranged weapons.
  • Can have forensic evaluation skill free of charge, won’t count toward spec skills or off-spec skills.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear plate armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.

item.title: Rules
item.description:
Macroing

  • You are allowed to macro 24/7.
  • Please do not use a “spam” macro in public places, you won’t be kicked for being idle on this shard. Talking every few seconds is fine though.
  • It is prohibited to spar/macro with above eight different NPC’s and/or players.
  • Do not macro in jail.

Communication

  • While you may use whatever selection of words when communicating with others, be mindful that staff members have full powers to jail you for whatever period of time they deem reasonable if you use any sort of rude language to them. You will first be warned, if you still continue, you may receive up to 5 days jail time if you ignore the warning;
  • Do not spam in any in-game chat system. You may temporarily or permanently lose the ability to communicate via in-game systems if you abuse it;
  • Racism will receive an instant 7 day jail time for the character you used and any other you are associated with;
  • Abuse of staff can result in up to 7 days jail time, decided by the staff member;
  • Speak English in the Global chat (.chat).

Bugs/Hacks/Cheats/Exploits/Loopholes

  • Using, abusing, or failing to report an error in the game which may give unintentional benefits will not go unnoticed for long, and may in return see you permanently lose stats, skills, characters or accounts depending on the severity of the bug abuse.
  • If you find any exploitable bug, please report it immediately with either the in-game help system or PM Nagash the details of the bug. Not doing so will be severely punished.
  • There are in-game tools that we can use to track inconsistencies, so you will not get away with any major exploit for long if you choose to abuse bugs.
  • Any minor glitches/bugs may be reported in the Bugs and Suggestions thread in the forum or also by using the in-game help menu.

Ghosting

What does “Ghosting” mean? It basically means that placing a stationary character in front or inside a dungeon or other points of interest(only NPC related points of interest) to observe when someone is entering a place such as a dungeon is illegal.

item.title: Server Info
item.description:
Server

  • The emulator is POL1.00.
  • The server is situated in the Netherlands hosted on a 500/500 Mbit internet connection.

Skills and classes

Classes feature the same mechanics as the original Zuluhotel 3. Which means 130 skill/status soft-cap and 150 skill hard-cap with no status cap.

Skillgain speed will be moderate. Which essentially means that certain skills are easier to train than others. You will be able to start out with a boost of two skills (of your choice) set to 90 and one stat (Str, Dex, Int) to 90.

item.title: Skill Modifiers
item.description:
Skill prefixes

Skill prefixes on weapons are multiplied by 5, so as an example an Expert Fencer’s Kryss will give 3 * 5 = 15 fencing.

Weapon skill mods can’t become legendary level.

You can’t gain over the cap of the skill item, so as an example if you have 100 fencing and equip an Expert Fencer’s Kryss you will only get 110 fencing since that’s the cap for expert items.

item.title: Thief
item.description:
Skills

  • Detecting hidden
  • Hiding
  • Lockpicking
  • Poisoning
  • Remove trap
  • Snooping
  • Stealing
  • Stealth

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with poison.
  • Can poison anything, protections doesn’t work against thief poisons.
  • Gains dexterity quicker.
  • Can use crossbow, heavy crossbow, bow, kryss, short spear, spear, war fork, knife, skinning knife and pitchfork without skill for it, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear ringmail/chainmail/platemail armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.

item.title: Warrior
item.description:
Skills

  • Anatomy
  • Fencing
  • Healing
  • Mace Fighting
  • Parrying
  • Swordsmanship
  • Tactics
  • Wrestling

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with melee weapons.
  • Receives less melee damage.
  • Gains strength quicker.

Penalties

  • Can’t equip intelligence mods.
  • Takes increased spell damage.
  • Deals less spell damage.
  • Cast spells slower.
  • Won’t get any bonuses from equipping magic reflect items.
  • Can only cast circle 1 spells.
  • Gains intelligence slower.

item.title: Weapon Modifiers
item.description:
Stat prefixes

When an item receives a negative modifier it means the item is cursed.

Cursed items cannot be unequipped. Visit a High Priest to uncurse the item. Simply say “Uncurse” to be able to unequip it or “Purify” to revert the item to it’s positive form.

For example a purified Frail (-8 str) will turn into a Hero’s (+8 str) modifier.

Strength Intelligence Dexterity Amount
Warrior’s Apprentice’s Cutpurse’s +2
Veteran’s Adept’s Thief’s +4
Champion’s Wizard’s Cat Burglar’s +6
Hero’s Archmage’s Tumbler’s +8
Warlord’s Magister’s Acrobat’s +10
King’s Oracle’s Escape Artist’s +12
Weakling’s Fool’s Heavy -2
Enfeebling Simpleton’s Leaden -4
Powerless Infantile Encumbering -6
Frail Senile Binding -8
Diseased Demented Fumbling -10
Leper’s Madman’s Blundering -12

Damage suffixes

Suffix Damage
Ruin +5
Might +10
Force +15
Power +20
Vanquishing +25
Devastation +30
Gentle Touch -5
Feather’s Touch -10
Calmness -15
Even Temper -20
Tranquility -25
Pacifism -30

Greater effects

Name/Cursed name Effect
Poisoned/Envenomed Poison hit
Banishing/Summoning Banish hit
Bloody/Lifegiver’s Life drain hit
Vampiric/Mind Twisting Mana drain hit
Leech’s/Parasitic Stamina drain hit
Blinding/Bedazzling Blinding hit
Blackrock/Poor Quality Blackrock 50% Chance to dispel the defender. Also removes the defender and attackers mana.
Void/Void’s Touch Randomly life/mana/stamina drain hit.
Elemental Fury/Elemental Vengeance Hits a trial spell hit with fire/air/water damage aswell as some pure damage wich you can’t defend against.

Spell suffixes

Spell suffixes cast spells on hit.

item.title: Play Now
item.description:
Below are the instructions on how to get started. Please read carefully…

If you have any issues contact us on Discord.

Please download and install Ultima Online 9th Anniversary first. Make sure NOT to update it.

Requirements

  • A fresh installed Ultima Online 9th anniversary edition that hasn’t been updated.
  • A program that can open .zip files (Winzip, Winrar, 7-Zip etc…)

Step 1

Download our shard files.
